title: Customer groups collection Schema
description: A schema for retrieving a collection of customer groups.

collection.description: A collection of the customer groups.

items.title: Customer group
items.description: A schema for information about a customer group.

name.description: The name of the customer group.

account.description: The account used by the accruals.

accountType.description: The type of account in the chart of accounts.

balance.description: The current balance of the account.

blockDirectEntries.description: Determines if the account can be manually updated with entries.

debitCredit.description: Describes the default update type of the account.

accountingYears.description: A unique reference to the accounting years for this account.

self.description: A unique reference to the account resource.

customers.description: The unique self reference of the customers belonging to this customer group.

layout.description: The default layout used by the customer group.

deleted.description: If true this indicates that the layout is deleted and can't be used anymore.

self.description: A unique reference to the layout resource.
The unique self reference of the customer group.

metaData.description: Information about possible actions, endpoints and resource paths related to the endpoint.

self.description: The unique self reference of the accounts collection.
